division_title: REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE
text: The penalty for delinquency with respect to any transfer is fifteen dollars ($15) and applies only to the last transfer.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 3. REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE [4000 - 9808]
### Chapter 6. Registration and Weight Fees [9101 - 9808]
#### Article 4. Payment of Fees [9550 - 9564]
##### § 9553.7

The penalty for delinquency with respect to any transfer is fifteen dollars ($15) and applies only to the last transfer.

*(Added by Stats. 2008, Ch. 756, Sec. 21. Effective September 30, 2008.)*

subsections.text: The penalty for delinquency with respect to any transfer is fifteen dollars ($15) and applies only to the last transfer.
